'''√zh-d-l''' ('''zhadala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twitlist|twitlist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twitlist|twitlist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √zh-d-l
|-
! Lemma
| zhadala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadalithi|zhadalithi]] || [[word:zhadaliji|zhadaliji]] || [[word:zhadalishi|zhadalishi]] || [[word:zhadali|zhadali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadaluthuth|zhadaluthuth]] || [[word:zhadalujuj|zhadalujuj]] || [[word:zhadalushush|zhadalushush]] || [[word:zhadal|zhadal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadaluthu|zhadaluthu]] || [[word:zhadaluju|zhadaluju]] || [[word:zhadalushu|zhadalushu]] || [[word:zhadalu|zhadalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadalufuth|zhadalufuth]] || [[word:zhadalufuj|zhadalufuj]] || [[word:zhadalufush|zhadalufush]] || [[word:zhadaluf|zhadaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadalethe|zhadalethe]] || [[word:zhadaleje|zhadaleje]] || [[word:zhadaleshe|zhadaleshe]] || [[word:zhadale|zhadale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadalothoth|zhadalothoth]] || [[word:zhadalojoj|zhadalojoj]] || [[word:zhadaloshosh|zhadaloshosh]] || [[word:zhadal|zhadal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadalotho|zhadalotho]] || [[word:zhadalojo|zhadalojo]] || [[word:zhadalosho|zhadalosho]] || [[word:zhadalo|zhadalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadalofoth|zhadalofoth]] || [[word:zhadalofoj|zhadalofoj]] || [[word:zhadalofosh|zhadalofosh]] || [[word:zhadalof|zhadalof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadalïfïf|zhadalïfïf]] || [[word:zhadalïfïf|zhadalïfïf]] || [[word:zhadalïfïf|zhadalïfïf]] || [[word:zhadalïfïf|zhadalïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]] || [[word:zhadalïf|zhadalïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadalæthæ|zhadalæthæ]] || [[word:zhadalæjæ|zhadalæjæ]] || [[word:zhadalæshæ|zhadalæshæ]] || [[word:zhadalæ|zhadalæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadalathath|zhadalathath]] || [[word:zhadalajaj|zhadalajaj]] || [[word:zhadalashash|zhadalashash]] || [[word:zhadal|zhadal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadalatha|zhadalatha]] || [[word:zhadalaja|zhadalaja]] || [[word:zhadalasha|zhadalasha]] || [[word:zhadala|zhadala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadalafath|zhadalafath]] || [[word:zhadalafaj|zhadalafaj]] || [[word:zhadalafash|zhadalafash]] || [[word:zhadalaf|zhadalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhadalasha|zhadalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhadalasha|gozhadalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhadalasha|gokizhadalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhadalnüsha|zhadalnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhadalnknüsha|gozhadalnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadalnüsha|gokizhadalnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhadalshësha|zhadalshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhadalnkshësha|gozhadalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhadalshësha|gokizhadalshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadalrosha|zhadalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadalnkrosha|gozhadalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadalrosha|gokizhadalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadalmusha|zhadalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadalnkmusha|gozhadalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadalmusha|gokizhadalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhadalsherasha|zhadalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhadalnksherasha|gozhadalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhadalsherasha|gokizhadalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhadalngasha|zhadalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhadalnkngasha|gozhadalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhadalngasha|gokizhadalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhadalyasha|zhadalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhadalnkyasha|gozhadalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhadalyasha|gokizhadalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhadalyamasha|zhadalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhadalnkyamasha|gozhadalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhadalyamasha|gokizhadalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadalnüshësha|zhadalnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadalnknüshësha|gozhadalnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadalnüshësha|gokizhadalnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadalnürosha|zhadalnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadalnknürosha|gozhadalnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadalnürosha|gokizhadalnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadalnümusha|zhadalnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadalnknümusha|gozhadalnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadalnümusha|gokizhadalnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadalshënüsha|zhadalshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadalnkshënüsha|gozhadalnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadalshënüsha|gokizhadalshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadalshërosha|zhadalshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadalnkshërosha|gozhadalnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadalshërosha|gokizhadalshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadalshëmusha|zhadalshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadalnkshëmusha|gozhadalnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadalshëmusha|gokizhadalshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadalronüsha|zhadalronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadalnkronüsha|gozhadalnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadalronüsha|gokizhadalronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadalroshësha|zhadalroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadalnkroshësha|gozhadalnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadalroshësha|gokizhadalroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadalromusha|zhadalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadalnkromusha|gozhadalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadalromusha|gokizhadalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadalmunüsha|zhadalmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadalnkmunüsha|gozhadalnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadalmunüsha|gokizhadalmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadalmushësha|zhadalmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadalnkmushësha|gozhadalnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadalmushësha|gokizhadalmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadalmurosha|zhadalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadalnkmurosha|gozhadalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadalmurosha|gokizhadalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhadal|zhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zhædæl|zhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhadal|hozhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozhædæl|hozhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhadal|hohozhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhædæl|hohozhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüzhadal|nüzhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüzhædæl|nüzhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüzhadal|nünüzhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüzhædæl|nünüzhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïzhadal|nïzhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïzhædæl|nïzhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïzhadal|nïnïzhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïzhædæl|nïnïzhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhadal|luzhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzhædæl|luzhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhadal|luluzhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhædæl|luluzhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhadal|lizhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizhædæl|lizhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhadal|lilizhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhædæl|lilizhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhadal|kozhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozhædæl|kozhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhadal|kokozhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhædæl|kokozhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhadal|kezhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezhædæl|kezhædæl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhadal|kekezhadal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhædæl|kekezhædæl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
